title: Drodi's Slimes
description: My take on a new Slimes and Magma Cubes. Dordinatteur Co does not take responsability for any attemps at eating them.
body:
**This ressource pack requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)/[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)**

It features my own take on a redesign of the _Slime_ and _Magma Cube_, along with the _Slime Block_.

[**Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) compatible version: [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/drodis-slimes-x-fresh-animations)
<details>
<summary>Official Sources:</summary>
The only official versions of my resource packs are available on:

> Curseforge: [**Dordinatteur**](https://www.curseforge.com/members/dordinatteur/projects)
> 
> Modrinth: [**Drodi**](https://modrinth.com/user/Drodi)
> 
> Planet Minecraft: [**Drodi**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/drodi/)

Any other website may host unauthorized reuploads, which could contain viruses or malware. If you choose to download from unofficial sources, you do so at your own risk.

If you suspect that someone is reuploading my resource packs without permission and action can be taken, please contact me on Discord: drodi99.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Credits:</summary>

- [**Reijvi**](https://modrinth.com/user/Reijvi): Previous versions of this pack used to have _Slime Ball_ and _Magma Cream_ textures from [Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined).

- **Venixalis**: Inspiration for the _Magma Cube_ design.

</details>
